raw_sql:
SELECT 
    COUNT(*) AS total_movies,
    AVG(r.info::numeric) AS avg_rating,
    PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY r.info::numeric) AS median_rating,
    MIN(r.info::numeric) AS min_rating,
    MAX(r.info::numeric) AS max_rating,
    STDDEV(r.info::numeric) AS stddev_rating
FROM title t
JOIN movie_info_idx r ON r.movie_id = t.id
    AND r.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating')
WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009
    AND t.kind_id = (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'movie')
    AND r.info ~ '^[0-9]+\.?[0-9]*$';

SELECT 
    g.info AS genre,
    COUNT(*) AS movie_count,
    ROUND(AVG(r.info::numeric)::numeric, 3) AS avg_rating,
    ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY r.info::numeric)::numeric, 2) AS median_rating,
    ROUND(STDDEV(r.info::numeric)::numeric, 3) AS stddev_rating,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE r.info::numeric >= 7.0) AS high_rated_count,
    ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE r.info::numeric >= 7.0) / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_high_rated
FROM title t
JOIN movie_info_idx r ON r.movie_id = t.id
    AND r.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating')
JOIN movie_info g ON g.movie_id = t.id
    AND g.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'genres')
WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009
    AND t.kind_id = (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'movie')
    AND r.info ~ '^[0-9]+\.?[0-9]*$'
GROUP BY g.info
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 100
ORDER BY avg_rating DESC;

WITH director_experience AS (
    SELECT 
        ci.person_id,
        t.id AS movie_id,
        t.production_year,
        COUNT(*) OVER (
            PARTITION BY ci.person_id 
            ORDER BY t.production_year, t.id
            ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING
        ) AS prior_films
    FROM cast_info ci
    JOIN title t ON t.id = ci.movie_id
    WHERE ci.role_id = (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director')
        AND t.kind_id = (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'movie')
        AND t.production_year BETWEEN 1970 AND 2009
),
film_director AS (
    SELECT movie_id, MAX(prior_films) AS max_prior_films
    FROM director_experience
    WHERE production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009
    GROUP BY movie_id
)
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN fd.max_prior_films = 0 THEN '0 (debut)'
        WHEN fd.max_prior_films BETWEEN 1 AND 2 THEN '1-2'
        WHEN fd.max_prior_films BETWEEN 3 AND 5 THEN '3-5'
        WHEN fd.max_prior_films BETWEEN 6 AND 10 THEN '6-10'
        ELSE '11+'
    END AS director_prior_films,
    COUNT(*) AS movie_count,
    ROUND(AVG(r.info::numeric)::numeric, 3) AS avg_rating,
    ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY r.info::numeric)::numeric, 2) AS median_rating,
    ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE r.info::numeric >= 7.0) / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_high_rated
FROM film_director fd
JOIN movie_info_idx r ON r.movie_id = fd.movie_id
    AND r.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating')
    AND r.info ~ '^[0-9]+\.?[0-9]*$'
JOIN title t ON t.id = fd.movie_id
    AND t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009
    AND t.kind_id = (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'movie')
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY MIN(fd.max_prior_films);

groupby_keys: (CASE WHEN (fd.max_prior_films = 0) THEN '0 (debut)'::text WHEN ((fd.max_prior_films >= 1) AND (fd.max_prior_films <= 2)) THEN '1-2'::text WHEN ((fd.max_prior_films >= 3) AND (fd.max_prior_films <= 5)) THEN '3-5'::text WHEN ((fd.max_prior_films >= 6) AND (fd.max_prior_films <= 10)) THEN '6-10'::text ELSE '11+'::text END)

raw_sql:
WITH company_size AS (
    SELECT 
        cn.id AS company_id,
        cn.name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT mc.movie_id) FILTER (
            WHERE t2.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009
        ) AS films_in_decade
    FROM company_name cn
    JOIN movie_companies mc ON mc.company_id = cn.id
        AND mc.company_type_id = (SELECT id FROM company_type WHERE kind = 'production companies')
    JOIN title t2 ON t2.id = mc.movie_id
        AND t2.kind_id = (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'movie')
        AND t2.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009
    GROUP BY cn.id, cn.name
),
movie_top_company AS (
    SELECT 
        mc.movie_id,
        MAX(cs.films_in_decade) AS top_company_size
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_size cs ON cs.company_id = mc.company_id
    WHERE mc.company_type_id = (SELECT id FROM company_type WHERE kind = 'production companies')
    GROUP BY mc.movie_id
)
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN mtc.top_company_size = 1 THEN '1 film'
        WHEN mtc.top_company_size BETWEEN 2 AND 5 THEN '2-5 films'
        WHEN mtc.top_company_size BETWEEN 6 AND 15 THEN '6-15 films'
        WHEN mtc.top_company_size BETWEEN 16 AND 50 THEN '16-50 films'
        ELSE '51+ films'
    END AS company_size_bucket,
    COUNT(*) AS movie_count,
    ROUND(AVG(r.info::numeric)::numeric, 3) AS avg_rating,
    ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY r.info::numeric)::numeric, 2) AS median_rating,
    ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE r.info::numeric >= 7.0) / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_high_rated
FROM movie_top_company mtc
JOIN title t ON t.id = mtc.movie_id
    AND t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009
    AND t.kind_id = (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'movie')
JOIN movie_info_idx r ON r.movie_id = t.id
    AND r.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating')
    AND r.info ~ '^[0-9]+\.?[0-9]*$'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY MIN(mtc.top_company_size);

groupby_keys: (CASE WHEN ((max((count(DISTINCT mc_1.movie_id) FILTER (WHERE ((t2.production_year >= 2000) AND (t2.production_year <= 2009)))))) = 1) THEN '1 film'::text WHEN (((max((count(DISTINCT mc_1.movie_id) FILTER (WHERE ((t2.production_year >= 2000) AND (t2.production_year <= 2009)))))) >= 2) AND ((max((count(DISTINCT mc_1.movie_id) FILTER (WHERE ((t2.production_year >= 2000) AND (t2.production_year <= 2009)))))) <= 5)) THEN '2-5 films'::text WHEN (((max((count(DISTINCT mc_1.movie_id) FILTER (WHERE ((t2.production_year >= 2000) AND (t2.production_year <= 2009)))))) >= 6) AND ((max((count(DISTINCT mc_1.movie_id) FILTER (WHERE ((t2.production_year >= 2000) AND (t2.production_year <= 2009)))))) <= 15)) THEN '6-15 films'::text WHEN (((max((count(DISTINCT mc_1.movie_id) FILTER (WHERE ((t2.production_year >= 2000) AND (t2.production_year <= 2009)))))) >= 16) AND ((max((count(DISTINCT mc_1.movie_id) FILTER (WHERE ((t2.production_year >= 2000) AND (t2.production_year <= 2009)))))) <= 50)) THEN '16-50 films'::text ELSE '51+ films'::text END)

raw_sql:
WITH cast_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        ci.movie_id,
        COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ci.role_id IN (
            SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor', 'actress')
        )) AS cast_size,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ci.person_id) FILTER (WHERE ci.role_id IN (
            SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor', 'actress')
        )) AS unique_cast
    FROM cast_info ci
    JOIN title t ON t.id = ci.movie_id
        AND t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009
        AND t.kind_id = (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'movie')
    GROUP BY ci.movie_id
)
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN cs.cast_size <= 5 THEN '1-5'
        WHEN cs.cast_size BETWEEN 6 AND 15 THEN '6-15'
        WHEN cs.cast_size BETWEEN 16 AND 30 THEN '16-30'
        WHEN cs.cast_size BETWEEN 31 AND 60 THEN '31-60'
        ELSE '61+'
    END AS cast_size_bucket,
    COUNT(*) AS movie_count,
    ROUND(AVG(r.info::numeric)::numeric, 3) AS avg_rating,
    ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY r.info::numeric)::numeric, 2) AS median_rating,
    ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE r.info::numeric >= 7.0) / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_high_rated
FROM cast_stats cs
JOIN title t ON t.id = cs.movie_id
JOIN movie_info_idx r ON r.movie_id = cs.movie_id
    AND r.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating')
    AND r.info ~ '^[0-9]+\.?[0-9]*$'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY MIN(cs.cast_size);

groupby_keys: (CASE WHEN (cs.cast_size <= 5) THEN '1-5'::text WHEN ((cs.cast_size >= 6) AND (cs.cast_size <= 15)) THEN '6-15'::text WHEN ((cs.cast_size >= 16) AND (cs.cast_size <= 30)) THEN '16-30'::text WHEN ((cs.cast_size >= 31) AND (cs.cast_size <= 60)) THEN '31-60'::text ELSE '61+'::text END)

raw_sql:
WITH runtime_data AS (
    SELECT 
        t.id AS movie_id,
        -- Take the first numeric runtime value
        (regexp_match(mi.info, '^(\d+)'))[1]::integer AS runtime_mins
    FROM title t
    JOIN movie_info mi ON mi.movie_id = t.id
        AND mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'runtimes')
        AND mi.info ~ '^\d+'
    WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009
        AND t.kind_id = (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'movie')
),
runtime_deduped AS (
    SELECT movie_id, MIN(runtime_mins) AS runtime_mins
    FROM runtime_data
    WHERE runtime_mins BETWEEN 40 AND 240
    GROUP BY movie_id
)
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN rd.runtime_mins < 60 THEN '<60 min'
        WHEN rd.runtime_mins BETWEEN 60 AND 89 THEN '60-89 min'
        WHEN rd.runtime_mins BETWEEN 90 AND 109 THEN '90-109 min'
        WHEN rd.runtime_mins BETWEEN 110 AND 129 THEN '110-129 min'
        WHEN rd.runtime_mins BETWEEN 130 AND 149 THEN '130-149 min'
        ELSE '150+ min'
    END AS runtime_bucket,
    COUNT(*) AS movie_count,
    ROUND(AVG(r.info::numeric)::numeric, 3) AS avg_rating,
    ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY r.info::numeric)::numeric, 2) AS median_rating,
    ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE r.info::numeric >= 7.0) / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_high_rated
FROM runtime_deduped rd
JOIN movie_info_idx r ON r.movie_id = rd.movie_id
    AND r.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating')
    AND r.info ~ '^[0-9]+\.?[0-9]*$'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY MIN(rd.runtime_mins);

groupby_keys: (CASE WHEN ((min(((regexp_match(mi.info, '^(\d+)'::text))[1])::integer)) < 60) THEN '<60 min'::text WHEN (((min(((regexp_match(mi.info, '^(\d+)'::text))[1])::integer)) >= 60) AND ((min(((regexp_match(mi.info, '^(\d+)'::text))[1])::integer)) <= 89)) THEN '60-89 min'::text WHEN (((min(((regexp_match(mi.info, '^(\d+)'::text))[1])::integer)) >= 90) AND ((min(((regexp_match(mi.info, '^(\d+)'::text))[1])::integer)) <= 109)) THEN '90-109 min'::text WHEN (((min(((regexp_match(mi.info, '^(\d+)'::text))[1])::integer)) >= 110) AND ((min(((regexp_match(mi.info, '^(\d+)'::text))[1])::integer)) <= 129)) THEN '110-129 min'::text WHEN (((min(((regexp_match(mi.info, '^(\d+)'::text))[1])::integer)) >= 130) AND ((min(((regexp_match(mi.info, '^(\d+)'::text))[1])::integer)) <= 149)) THEN '130-149 min'::text ELSE '150+ min'::text END)

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    c.info AS country,
    COUNT(*) AS movie_count,
    ROUND(AVG(r.info::numeric)::numeric, 3) AS avg_rating,
    ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY r.info::numeric)::numeric, 2) AS median_rating,
    ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE r.info::numeric >= 7.0) / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_high_rated
FROM title t
JOIN movie_info_idx r ON r.movie_id = t.id
    AND r.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating')
    AND r.info ~ '^[0-9]+\.?[0-9]*$'
JOIN movie_info c ON c.movie_id = t.id
    AND c.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'countries')
WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009
    AND t.kind_id = (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'movie')
GROUP BY c.info
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 200
ORDER BY avg_rating DESC
LIMIT 20;

SELECT 
    k.keyword,
    COUNT(*) AS movie_count,
    ROUND(AVG(r.info::numeric)::numeric, 3) AS avg_rating,
    ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY r.info::numeric)::numeric, 2) AS median_rating,
    ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE r.info::numeric >= 7.0) / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_high_rated
FROM title t
JOIN movie_info_idx r ON r.movie_id = t.id
    AND r.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating')
    AND r.info ~ '^[0-9]+\.?[0-9]*$'
JOIN movie_keyword mk ON mk.movie_id = t.id
JOIN keyword k ON k.id = mk.keyword_id
WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009
    AND t.kind_id = (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'movie')
GROUP BY k.keyword
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 500
ORDER BY avg_rating DESC
LIMIT 25;

SELECT 
    k.keyword,
    COUNT(*) AS movie_count,
    ROUND(AVG(r.info::numeric)::numeric, 3) AS avg_rating,
    ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE r.info::numeric >= 7.0) / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_high_rated
FROM title t
JOIN movie_info_idx r ON r.movie_id = t.id
    AND r.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating')
    AND r.info ~ '^[0-9]+\.?[0-9]*$'
JOIN movie_keyword mk ON mk.movie_id = t.id
JOIN keyword k ON k.id = mk.keyword_id
WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009
    AND t.kind_id = (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'movie')
GROUP BY k.keyword
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 500
ORDER BY avg_rating ASC
LIMIT 20;

WITH runtime_data AS (
    SELECT 
        t.id AS movie_id,
        (regexp_match(mi.info, '^(\d+)'))[1]::integer AS runtime_mins
    FROM title t
    JOIN movie_info mi ON mi.movie_id = t.id
        AND mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'runtimes')
        AND mi.info ~ '^\d+'
    WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009
        AND t.kind_id = (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'movie')
),
runtime_deduped AS (
    SELECT movie_id, MIN(runtime_mins) AS runtime_mins
    FROM runtime_data
    WHERE runtime_mins BETWEEN 60 AND 240
    GROUP BY movie_id
)
SELECT 
    g.info AS genre,
    CASE 
        WHEN rd.runtime_mins < 90 THEN 'short (<90)'
        WHEN rd.runtime_mins BETWEEN 90 AND 119 THEN 'medium (90-119)'
        ELSE 'long (120+)'
    END AS runtime_bucket,
    COUNT(*) AS movie_count,
    ROUND(AVG(r.info::numeric)::numeric, 3) AS avg_rating
FROM runtime_deduped rd
JOIN title t ON t.id = rd.movie_id
JOIN movie_info_idx r ON r.movie_id = t.id
    AND r.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating')
    AND r.info ~ '^[0-9]+\.?[0-9]*$'
JOIN movie_info g ON g.movie_id = t.id
    AND g.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'genres')
WHERE g.info IN ('Drama', 'Comedy', 'Action', 'Horror', 'Animation', 'Biography', 'Documentary')
    AND t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009
    AND t.kind_id = (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'movie')
GROUP BY g.info, 2
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 30
ORDER BY g.info, MIN(rd.runtime_mins);

groupby_keys: (CASE WHEN ((min(((regexp_match(mi.info, '^(\d+)'::text))[1])::integer)) < 90) THEN 'short (<90)'::text WHEN (((min(((regexp_match(mi.info, '^(\d+)'::text))[1])::integer)) >= 90) AND ((min(((regexp_match(mi.info, '^(\d+)'::text))[1])::integer)) <= 119)) THEN 'medium (90-119)'::text ELSE 'long (120+)'::text END)

raw_sql:
WITH runtime_data AS (
    SELECT 
        t.id AS movie_id,
        MIN((regexp_match(mi.info, '^(\d+)'))[1]::integer) AS runtime_mins
    FROM title t
    JOIN movie_info mi ON mi.movie_id = t.id
        AND mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'runtimes')
        AND mi.info ~ '^\d+'
    WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009
        AND t.kind_id = (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'movie')
    GROUP BY t.id
    HAVING MIN((regexp_match(mi.info, '^(\d+)'))[1]::integer) BETWEEN 60 AND 240
),
company_size AS (
    SELECT 
        mc.movie_id,
        MAX(sub.films_in_decade) AS top_company_size
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN (
        SELECT mc2.company_id, COUNT(DISTINCT mc2.movie_id) AS films_in_decade
        FROM movie_companies mc2
        JOIN title t2 ON t2.id = mc2.movie_id
            AND t2.kind_id = (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'movie')
            AND t2.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009
        WHERE mc2.company_type_id = (SELECT id FROM company_type WHERE kind = 'production companies')
        GROUP BY mc2.company_id
    ) sub ON sub.company_id = mc.company_id
    WHERE mc.company_type_id = (SELECT id FROM company_type WHERE kind = 'production companies')
    GROUP BY mc.movie_id
)
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN cs.top_company_size <= 5 THEN 'small (1-5)'
        WHEN cs.top_company_size BETWEEN 6 AND 50 THEN 'mid (6-50)'
        ELSE 'major (51+)'
    END AS company_tier,
    CASE 
        WHEN rd.runtime_mins < 90 THEN 'short (<90)'
        WHEN rd.runtime_mins BETWEEN 90 AND 119 THEN 'medium (90-119)'
        ELSE 'long (120+)'
    END AS runtime_bucket,
    COUNT(*) AS movie_count,
    ROUND(AVG(r.info::numeric)::numeric, 3) AS avg_rating,
    ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE r.info::numeric >= 7.0) / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_high_rated
FROM company_size cs
JOIN runtime_data rd ON rd.movie_id = cs.movie_id
JOIN title t ON t.id = cs.movie_id
    AND t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009
    AND t.kind_id = (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'movie')
JOIN movie_info_idx r ON r.movie_id = t.id
    AND r.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating')
    AND r.info ~ '^[0-9]+\.?[0-9]*$'
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1, MIN(rd.runtime_mins);

groupby_keys: (CASE WHEN ((max(sub.films_in_decade)) <= 5) THEN 'small (1-5)'::text WHEN (((max(sub.films_in_decade)) >= 6) AND ((max(sub.films_in_decade)) <= 50)) THEN 'mid (6-50)'::text ELSE 'major (51+)'::text END)
(CASE WHEN (rd.runtime_mins < 90) THEN 'short (<90)'::text WHEN ((rd.runtime_mins >= 90) AND (rd.runtime_mins <= 119)) THEN 'medium (90-119)'::text ELSE 'long (120+)'::text END)

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN k.keyword IN ('tears','crying','song','singing','food','rain','snow','bicycle','photograph','book') 
        THEN 'emotional/intimate keywords'
        WHEN k.keyword IN ('gore','ghost','martial-arts','sequel','murder','blood','shootout','revenge')
        THEN 'action/horror keywords'
        ELSE 'other'
    END AS keyword_theme,
    g.info AS genre,
    COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) AS movie_count,
    ROUND(AVG(r.info::numeric)::numeric, 3) AS avg_rating,
    ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) FILTER (WHERE r.info::numeric >= 7.0) / COUNT(DISTINCT t.id), 1) AS pct_high_rated
FROM title t
JOIN movie_info_idx r ON r.movie_id = t.id
    AND r.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating')
    AND r.info ~ '^[0-9]+\.?[0-9]*$'
JOIN movie_keyword mk ON mk.movie_id = t.id
JOIN keyword k ON k.id = mk.keyword_id
    AND k.keyword IN ('tears','crying','song','singing','food','rain','snow','bicycle','photograph','book',
                      'gore','ghost','martial-arts','sequel','murder','blood','shootout','revenge')
JOIN movie_info g ON g.movie_id = t.id
    AND g.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'genres')
    AND g.info IN ('Drama', 'Comedy', 'Action', 'Horror', 'Documentary')
WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009
    AND t.kind_id = (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'movie')
GROUP BY 1, 2
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) >= 30
ORDER BY g.info, 1;

groupby_keys: (CASE WHEN (k.keyword = ANY ('{tears,crying,song,singing,food,rain,snow,bicycle,photograph,book}'::text[])) THEN 'emotional/intimate keywords'::text WHEN (k.keyword = ANY ('{gore,ghost,martial-arts,sequel,murder,blood,shootout,revenge}'::text[])) THEN 'action/horror keywords'::text ELSE 'other'::text END)

raw_sql:
WITH base AS (
    SELECT 
        t.id AS movie_id,
        r.info::numeric AS rating
    FROM title t
    JOIN movie_info_idx r ON r.movie_id = t.id
        AND r.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating')
        AND r.info ~ '^[0-9]+\.?[0-9]*$'
    WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009
        AND t.kind_id = (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'movie')
),
runtime_data AS (
    SELECT movie_id, MIN((regexp_match(info, '^(\d+)'))[1]::integer) AS runtime_mins
    FROM movie_info
    WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'runtimes')
        AND info ~ '^\d+'
    GROUP BY movie_id
    HAVING MIN((regexp_match(info, '^(\d+)'))[1]::integer) BETWEEN 60 AND 240
),
top_genre AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT ON (movie_id) movie_id, info AS genre
    FROM movie_info
    WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'genres')
    ORDER BY movie_id, info
),
emotional_kw AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT mk.movie_id
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword k ON k.id = mk.keyword_id
    WHERE k.keyword IN ('tears','crying','song','singing','food','rain','snow','bicycle','photograph','book','letter','prayer','baby')
),
major_studio AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN (
        SELECT company_id FROM movie_companies mc2
        JOIN title t2 ON t2.id = mc2.movie_id
            AND t2.kind_id = (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'movie')
            AND t2.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009
        WHERE mc2.company_type_id = (SELECT id FROM company_type WHERE kind = 'production companies')
        GROUP BY company_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT mc2.movie_id) >= 51
    ) big ON big.company_id = mc.company_id
    WHERE mc.company_type_id = (SELECT id FROM company_type WHERE kind = 'production companies')
)
SELECT
    factor,
    group_label,
    movie_count,
    ROUND(avg_rating::numeric, 3) AS avg_rating,
    ROUND(pct_high::numeric, 1) AS pct_high_rated
FROM (
    -- Runtime
    SELECT 'Runtime' AS factor,
        CASE WHEN rd.runtime_mins < 90 THEN '1_short(<90)' WHEN rd.runtime_mins < 120 THEN '2_medium(90-119)' ELSE '3_long(120+)' END AS group_label,
        COUNT(*) AS movie_count, AVG(b.rating) AS avg_rating,
        100.0*COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE b.rating >= 7) / COUNT(*) AS pct_high
    FROM base b JOIN runtime_data rd ON rd.movie_id = b.movie_id
    GROUP BY 2
    UNION ALL
    -- Genre top vs bottom
    SELECT 'Genre' AS factor,
        CASE WHEN tg.genre IN ('Animation','Biography','History','War','Music') THEN '1_top_genres' 
             WHEN tg.genre IN ('Horror','Action','Thriller') THEN '3_bottom_genres'
             ELSE '2_mid_genres' END AS group_label,
        COUNT(*) AS movie_count, AVG(b.rating) AS avg_rating,
        100.0*COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE b.rating >= 7) / COUNT(*) AS pct_high
    FROM base b JOIN top_genre tg ON tg.movie_id = b.movie_id
    GROUP BY 2
    UNION ALL
    -- Keyword theme
    SELECT 'Keyword Theme' AS factor,
        CASE WHEN ek.movie_id IS NOT NULL THEN '1_emotional_kws' ELSE '2_no_emotional_kws' END AS group_label,
        COUNT(*) AS movie_count, AVG(b.rating) AS avg_rating,
        100.0*COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE b.rating >= 7) / COUNT(*) AS pct_high
    FROM base b LEFT JOIN emotional_kw ek ON ek.movie_id = b.movie_id
    GROUP BY 2
    UNION ALL
    -- Company size
    SELECT 'Company Size' AS factor,
        CASE WHEN ms.movie_id IS NOT NULL THEN '1_major_studio(51+)' ELSE '2_smaller_co' END AS group_label,
        COUNT(*) AS movie_count, AVG(b.rating) AS avg_rating,
        100.0*COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE b.rating >= 7) / COUNT(*) AS pct_high
    FROM base b LEFT JOIN major_studio ms ON ms.movie_id = b.movie_id
    GROUP BY 2
) sub
ORDER BY factor, group_label;

groupby_keys: (CASE WHEN (rd.runtime_mins < 90) THEN '1_short(<90)'::text WHEN (rd.runtime_mins < 120) THEN '2_medium(90-119)'::text ELSE '3_long(120+)'::text END)

(CASE WHEN (movie_info_1.info = ANY ('{Animation,Biography,History,War,Music}'::text[])) THEN '1_top_genres'::text WHEN (movie_info_1.info = ANY ('{Horror,Action,Thriller}'::text[])) THEN '3_bottom_genres'::text ELSE '2_mid_genres'::text END)
CASE WHEN (mk.movie_id IS NOT NULL) THEN '1_emotional_kws'::text ELSE '2_no_emotional_kws'::text END
(CASE WHEN (mc.movie_id IS NOT NULL) THEN '1_major_studio(51+)'::text ELSE '2_smaller_co'::text END)
